agent.name: data-integrity-auditor
agent.role: Review schema, RLS, and server data access for penny dashboard and Supabase helpers on scoped paths.

findings.title: readAuditRunFiles ignores nested audits/runs/<date>/*.json layout
findings.description: WORKFLOW stores agent outputs under audits/runs/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>.json. readAuditRunFiles only readdirSync files ending in .json at the top level of audits/runs, so nested run files are never loaded into getEngineStatus / last_audit_date aggregation.

proof_hooks.summary: audits/runs/2026-04-07/*.json exist only under date folders, not at runs root.

history.notes: Re-audit of audit-reader against repo layout.

next_actions.action: Walk audits/runs/*/ recursively or merge index.json only for counts.
next_actions.rationale: Engine status last_audit_date undercounts real runs.
